          contrapose! hp; simp_all [Nat.Prime]⟩))
        rw [padicValNat_factorial]; simp_all
      · exact prime_of_mem_primesBelow (mem_primesBelow.mpr ⟨lt_succ_of_le (by linarith [hp]), by
          contrapose! hp; simp_all [Nat.Prime]⟩)
    have h_bound : ∀ k ≥ 1, P.n / p ^ k ≤ P.n / p := by
      intro k hk
      exact Nat.div_le_div_left (pow_le_pow_left (by linarith [hp]) hk) (by linarith [hp])
    calc (P.n.factorial).factorization p
        _ = ∑ k in Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k := h_legendre
        _ ≤ ∑ k in Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p := Finset.sum_le_sum fun k _ ↦ h_bound k (by linarith)
        _ = (Nat.log p P.n) * (P.n / p) := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Nat.card_Ico, Nat.sub_zero]
        _ ≤ (Real.log P.n / Real.log p + 1) * (P.n / p) := by
            have h_log : (Nat.log p P.n : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n / Real.log p := by
              apply Nat.cast_log_le_log_div_log
              linarith [hp]
            nlinarith
        _ ≤ Real.log P.n * (P.n / p) + P.n / p := by
            have h_log_p : Real.log p ≥ 1 := by
              have : p ≥ 2 := by
                have := prime_of_mem_primesBelow (mem_primesBelow.mpr ⟨lt_succ_of_le (by linarith [hp]), by
                  contrapose! hp; simp_all [Nat.Prime]⟩)
                linarith [this.two_le]
              exact Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith)
            nlinarith
        _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
            have h_n_div_p : P.n / p ≤ P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
              have h_p_le_L : p ≤ P.L := hp
              have h_L_sq : P.L * P.L < P.n := P.hL
              have h_pi_n : primeCounting P.n ≥ 1 := by
                apply Nat.succ_le_iff.mp
                exact primeCounting_pos.mpr (by linarith [h_L_sq])
              nlinarith [Nat.div_le_self P.n p, Nat.mul_le_mul_right P.M (by nlinarith : P.L^2 ≤ P.L^2)]
            nlinarith
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hsum, Nat.cast_zero, zero_sub,

            have hn_pos : P.n > 0 := by

            omega
